constraint: Label wort concentration in degrees Plato, not ABV percentage
rationale: Chinese regulation labels alcoholic strength by wort, not finished-product ABV. Commercial team rejects ideas that compare to ABV-labelled markets without conversion.

constraint: 330ml carton on Brand_C SKUs cannot be substituted with shrink-tray packaging
rationale: Carton serves dual purpose: secondary packaging plus in-store promotional display. Brand_C marketing rejects tray substitutions categorically.
